title: Lacking Attraction, Dry Male Orgasms, Keeping Hope Alive When Dating
podcast_name: Problem Solved with Jeff Guenther and Alex Moskovich
summary: Firstly, is Mr. Brightside a sport song? Great to have you back listeners. We're loving the comments and feedback, and we're also loving the little army of Problemistas we're growing here. So this week, what do you do when you don't want to bang your partner anymore? Not all men are created equally. Some men don't ejaculate when they orgasm. What do you think? True or false? Is the "Guy-Dry-Gasm" a real thing? Are you sick of the dating scene? We hear from a lovely lady who's disappointed with the men on offer. She's struggling to maintain a feeling of hope! So we offer great advice to, solve problems, and discuss penis sizes and orgasms, what more could you want? #GuyDryGasm is the hashtag mission of the week. Tag Alex and Jeff on social and use that "hashy", let's make silly stuff go viral. Cuz why not. summary: Happy Thursday Problemistas! We're solving problems left right and center today. No soundboard, but plenty of banter and  lots of laughs, so click play and enjoy.
